Environmental Protection.summary: Cotton has consistently opposed major environmental regulations and climate legislation, voting against the Inflation Reduction Act's climate provisions.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Cotton has opposed federal criminal justice reform efforts and sentencing reduction measures.
voted_against: EQUAL Act to reduce crack/powder cocaine sentencing disparity (Senate vote, 2021)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Cotton supports tax cuts and has opposed efforts to raise taxes on high earners and corporations.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Cotton has opposed federal marijuana legalization and decriminalization efforts.
voted_against: MORE Act marijuana decriminalization (opposed in statements, 2020)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Cotton opposes abortion rights and has supported restrictions on reproductive healthcare access.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Cotton has opposed federal LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality protections.
voted_against: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)
